1.premise: Puerto Rico crowds can still be predominantly white.

2.premise: Middle-aged men trying to become Twitch streamers are pathetic to watch.

1.premise: Taken literally, 'twitch' describes an old man's involuntary body movement, not a streaming platform.

2.premise: An elderly streamer's content would just be mundane medical routines.

3.premise: Crackheads accidentally produce better streaming content than anyone trying.

1.premise: Genuinely chaotic lives make crackheads more watchable than intentional streamers.

2.premise: Drug-fueled theft narrated as normal activity is more entertaining than any planned stream.

lines.text: How y'all doing tonight?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: White people in Puerto Rico!
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Hell yeah, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Life been going good.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've been on the road and shit, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But most of my homeboys my age, all them boys
lines.label: setup

lines.text: been going through like a midlife crisis.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My homeboy Johnny called me the other day,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and he was like, hey, Dave, I'm about to start streaming.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, streaming?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Man, I hung the phone up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Somebody want to see no old nigga twitch.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: 5.30 AM, chat.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Taking my blood pressure medicine.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: So I pass out at work again.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: There's only one type of people I want to see streamed,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and that's crackheads.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I pay top dollar to watch a crackhead stream.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 3.30 AM, just sucked my ninth digger today.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But I heard America gets to work.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: They doin' all kind of crackhead shit in the camera.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm about to take this full-size Washington dryer
lines.label: setup

lines.text: nine miles away on a 10-speed bicycle.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, yeah, thank God, that's been a bunch of fun, man.
lines.label: fluff
